description: After harvest, a farmer uploads a yield map from their combine. The agent needs to identify and explain areas of low yield.

nodes.task_description: Process and clean the raw yield map data, removing errors and outliers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a clean, accurate yield map.

nodes.task_description: Identify statistically significant low-yielding zones within the field.

expected_outcome.value: Agent outlines specific polygons on the map indicating problem areas.

nodes.task_description: Correlate the low-yield zones with other data layers like soil type and topography to suggest a probable cause.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the low-yield areas correspond with a sandy, low-lying part of the field, suggesting poor drainage was the cause.
